nasb.text: For this reason God will send upon them a deluding influence so that they will believe what is false,

esv.text: Therefore God sends them a strong delusion, so that they may believe what is false,

cnv.text: 因此，　神就使錯謬的思想運行在他們當中，讓他們相信虛謊，

ccb.text: 上帝就让他们是非不辨，去相信那些虚假的谎言，

csbs.text: 为此，神就把一种迷惑人的力量送进他们里面，使他们相信虚假之事，
